pageContext.name: Birds of Prey: Black Canary
pageContext.description: Thanks, but I'm good with the singing gig.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  Told you she had a killer voice. Inspired by actress Jurnee Smollett's live-action performance as Dinah Lance in Birds of Prey (And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn), this vibrant portrait of the crooning crimefighter pops against a backdrop of acoustic waves — talk about surround sound! Armed with her sonic voice and Harley Quinn's Good Night baseball bat, Black Canary is ready to shatter eardrums and kneecaps in the fight against her boss Roman Sionis, AKA Black Mask.   Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: Black Canary, written by Brenden Fletcher for DC Comics, this dazzling Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this movie-inspired Black Canary artwork will harmonize perfectly with your collection.  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Black Canary with the Birds of Prey: Huntress and Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  Your walls are just crying out for some new art! Make some noise and bring home the Birds of Prey: Black Canary Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay.
